programme.title: Wedding Wonderland
programme.desc: When family conflicts arise between happy couple Hallie and Lucas during the week before their big day, their plans for a breezy wedding in the tropics take a turn and their love is tested when they are forced to put on a small-town winter wedding in the snow.

programme.title: Death of a Salesman
programme.desc: During the post-war boom period of the late '40s, Willy Loman is an aging, traveling salesman, who despairs that his life his been lived in vain. Facing dispensability and insignificance in a heated, youthful economy, Willy is not ready to part with his cherished fantasies of an America that admires him for personable triumphs in the marketplace.

programme.title: Sagebrush Trail
programme.desc: A guy who was wrongfully convicted for murder breaks out of jail and heads out west. He ends up joining a gang, which just so happens to include the actual killer.

programme.title: The Efficiency Expert
programme.desc: An expert on productivity shows wacky workers in 1966 Australia how to run their moccasin factory like clockwork, despite laying off more than half the workforce.
